title: fagara elegans
intro: Fagara elegans, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a type of plant that belongs to the genus Zanthoxylum in the rutaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Fagara elegans include relief from digestive issues, pain relief, and anti-cancer properties. Fagara elegans is commonly prepared as a tea, dried herb, or capsule for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional cooking in some Asian cultures.
